title: Window Sticker/Restaurant Promotional Sign Design
brief: Print-Ready Window Decal Designer for Pizza Restaurant We are looking for a graphic designer to finalize and prepare several promotional window decals for our pizza restaurant. IMPORTANT: We already have approved sticker concepts. We are NOT looking for a complete redesign, logo design, or branding project. We need a designer who can professionally refine existing concepts, improve visual hierarchy where needed, replace placeholder logos with our actual logo, enhance food photography, and prepare large-format print-ready files. Scope of Work * Replace placeholder logo with our actual logo (files provided) * Rebuild existing designs in professional, high-resolution quality * Improve spacing, alignment, and visual hierarchy where appropriate * Enhance food photos for print use * Create print-ready files for storefront window decals * Prepare multiple promotional versions using the same design style Promotions Include * Large 1-Topping Pizza Special * Pizza & Wings Deal * Family Feast * Additional combo offers (if needed) Files We Will Provide * Professional food photography from a recent photoshoot * Existing sticker concepts/mockups * Restaurant logo files * Pricing and promotional details Requirements * Strong Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator skills * Experience with restaurant advertising, signage, flyers, or promotional graphics * Experience preparing files for large-format printing * Strong attention to detail * Ability to work quickly and communicate clearly Deliverables *
